title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Medical Officer with drive and ambition, Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners in Amritsar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners:
Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners!
